name: Simcity indoor golf simulator
about: Sim-City Indoor Golf is a family-owned and operated business that offers an indoor golfing experience using Trackman iO technology. The venue provides a welcoming atmosphere for golfers of all skill levels, with food and beverages available on-site. Pricing is $50 per hour for standard rates and $40 per hour for veterans. It is best suited for individuals looking to play, practice, or participate in leagues, with options for both casual and competitive play.
why_golfers_like_it: Advanced Trackman iO technology for precise ball and club tracking
Unified leagues across multiple locations with competitive leaderboards
On-site food and beverages partnered with Birdies Grill & Tavern

food_and_drink.notes: Food available on-site, partnered with Birdies Grill & Tavern
Beverages available on-site, partnered with Birdies Grill & Tavern

simulator_hardware.notes: Four brand-new Trackman i0 simulators with radar and optical tracking

faq.question: Do I need clubs?
faq.answer: It is recommended to bring your own clubs, but rental sets are available with limited availability.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Food and drinks are available on-site, but they must be kept outside the simulator bays.

faq.question: How much time is needed for 18 holes?
faq.answer: 2 golfers can complete 18 holes in 2 hours, while 4 golfers will need 4 hours.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is welcoming to golfers of all skill levels, including juniors.
